data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplify decision-making processes within the interface to reduce the time taken for user actions.
data.technical_spec: Design intuitive navigation paths and limit choices on any given screen.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimize the size and placement of clickable elements for quick accessibility.
data.technical_spec: Ensure important buttons and links are large and positioned where users naturally focus.

data.title: Peak-End Rule
data.description: Enhance user experiences by focusing on providing memorable peak experiences and leaving positive end impressions.
data.technical_spec: Prioritize smooth video playback and engaging content conclusions.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Adopt familiar user interface patterns to meet expectations set by other popular platforms.
data.technical_spec: Conduct usability tests to identify familiar patterns preferred by the users.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Keep content and functionality within the user's optimal cognitive load.
data.technical_spec: Break down complex information into smaller, easily digestible chunks.
